input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The current java-run failure appears to be a test expectation/behavior drift in ObjectPropertyAccessorTest rather than missing setup.
Existing OGNL tests include a JVM --add-opens for java.base/java.lang; preserve existing Gradle test configuration if reusing the current suite, but no new workflow-level setup was found.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/property navigation library; ognl:ognl:3.3.5 already brings its required compile dependency on Javassist transitively, and normal usage is parseExpression/getValue/setValue against POJOs and OgnlContext without external services.
